title: BlossomSuite
description: A client-side utility mod built for BlossomCraft that shows item cooldowns and tracks job XP and money progress across sessions.
body:
**BlossomSuite** is a client-side utility mod built specifically for [**BlossomCraft**](https://blossomcraft.org/), designed to provide clear, real-time insight into your gameplay without interfering with normal play.

### Features

* ⏱️ **Item cooldown tracking**
  * Visual cooldown HUD that displays supported items from your hotbar
  * Clear **Ready / Cooldown** states with countdown timers
  * Two HUD modes:
    * **Full** - item icon, name, and cooldown state
    * **Compact** - item icon and cooldown state only
  * Optional **sound and chat notifications** when cooldowns complete
  * Notification settings for volume and cooldown thresholds
  * Supports tracking cooldowns from **alt accounts**

* 📊 **Job XP tracking**
* 💰 **Money gain tracking**
* 💰 **Lifetime job money totals**
  * Tracks total money earned per server
  * Optional cross-server totals via command

* 🧩 **Session & segment-based statistics**
  * Track session and segment performance over time
  * Optional session rollover between play sessions
  * Optional automatic segment resets
  * Helps visualize progress, efficiency, and long-term performance

* 🧩 **Customizable UI**
  * All UI elements are draggable via **Edit Mode**
  * Jobs HUD and Cooldown HUD can be **scaled independently**
  * Adjustable **opacity settings** for HUD elements

* ⚙️ **Options Menu & ModMenu Support**
  * Configure settings without relying on commands
  * Organized sections for:
    * Jobs
    * Cooldowns
    * Chat
    * QOL features
  * Accessible through ModMenu

* 🎣 **Fishing Enhancements**
  * Replace bobber sound when a fish bites
  * Adjustable **volume** and **pitch**

* 🔄 **AutoSwapper (Experimental)**
  * Profile-based item swapping system
  * Behavior may vary depending on the server

* 💬 **Chat & QOL Features**
  * Chat HUD showing Private (marry) vs Public chat state
  * Advertisement system with manual keybind support
    * Includes a cooldown indicator in the Chat HUD
    * Prevents sending while on cooldown
  * Toggle job-related chat messages

* ⚙️ **Local configuration**
  * UI layout, toggles, and settings are saved locally
  * Cooldown item data can update remotely for faster support

---
